Medium (15s).summary: Short explainer with title, core visual build, and concise payoff.

Long (1m).summary: Structured explainer with intro, core idea, worked visual example, and recap.

Deep Dive (2m).summary: Detailed walkthrough with two mechanism phases, demo, and full recap.

Extended (5m).summary: Lecture-style narrative with motivation, foundations, deep explanation, applications, and summary.
